lines.content: - [x] Reports/ADR/spec/KB distinguish opened evidence from unverified or failed retrieval.

- Updated KB incident/task/spec so failed retrieval blocks claims, commits-as-complete, and completion.

commit.message: docs(kb): record Harmony evidence gate completion
